title: Man beaten to death, suspect arrested
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Breaking News","html":"Breaking News"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"KWANONQABA NEWS - KwaNonqaba police have arrested a suspect on a charge of murder following the death of a 30-year-old man who was allegedly beaten to death with a hockey stick.","html":"KWANONQABA NEWS - KwaNonqaba police have arrested a suspect on a charge of murder following the death of a 30-year-old man who was allegedly beaten to death with a hockey stick."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to Southern Cape police spokesperson Sergeant Chris Spies, officers were called to a Mossel Bay hospital at about 10:00 on Saturday 13 December.","html":"According to Southern Cape police spokesperson Sergeant Chris Spies, officers were called to a Mossel Bay hospital at about 10:00 on Saturday 13 December."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The victim was found with multiple head injuries believed to have been inflicted with a hockey stick.","html":"The victim was found with multiple head injuries believed to have been inflicted with a hockey stick."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A preliminary investigation suggests that the incident happened in Dadoo Street in KwaNonqaba.","html":"A preliminary investigation suggests that the incident happened in Dadoo Street in KwaNonqaba."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The man was declared dead by medical personnel at the hospital.","html":"The man was declared dead by medical personnel at the hospital."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The suspect is expected to appear in court once formally charged.","html":"The suspect is expected to appear in court once formally charged."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He is facing a charge of murder.","html":"He is facing a charge of murder."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The circumstances surrounding the incident are not yet known.","html":"The circumstances surrounding the incident are not yet known."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The identity of the suspect has not yet been released.","html":"The identity of the suspect has not yet been released."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Man beaten to death, suspect arrested
